fields.acceptance_criteria: History panel showing revision timeline; each revision shows timestamp, changed fields, state transition; diff highlighting between revisions; revert button per revision with confirmation; loads from GET /api/tickets/{id}/history
fields.title: Feature: History timeline — revision viewer with field diffs

fields.acceptance_criteria: History panel showing revision timeline from GET /api/tickets/{id}/history; each revision shows: timestamp, author (requires 261e7567 ticket-api author tracking), changed fields with before/after diff, state transitions highlighted; diff highlighting between consecutive revisions; revert button per revision with confirmation dialog (calls POST /api/tickets/{id}/revert); depends on 261e7567 being complete first for author display
fields.title: Feature: History timeline — revision viewer with field diffs
